case_title: ACCOUNTANTS 4 LESS INC VS. PETER ANDERSON dba ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCOUNTANTS 4 LESS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS ANDERSON, MARK DBA ANDERSON ANDERSON ARCHITECTURE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-21-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL FILED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ACCOUNTANTS 4 LESS INC AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS, ANDERSON, MARK DBA ANDERSON ANDERSON ARCHITECTURE SET FOR MAY-28-2008 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (PER ORDER OF DEC-08-2011) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCOUNTANTS 4 LESS INC AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS ANDERSON, MARK DBA ANDERSON ANDERSON ARCHITECTURE

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCOUNTANTS 4 LESS INC AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCOUNTANTS 4 LESS INC

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANDERSON, PETER DBA ANDERSON & ANDERSON ARCHITECTS, ANDERSON, MARK DBA ANDERSON ANDERSON ARCHITECTURE SET FOR JUL-01-2008 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-21-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. ALL PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR.
ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT OF MAR-27-2008 AND DISMISSING THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ALL NAMED DEFENDANTS
